user_question: What is the maximum payment value?
generated_sql: SELECT MAX(payment_value) AS maximum_payment_value FROM order_payments;
SELECT MIN(freight_value) AS minimum_freight_cost FROM order_items;

SELECT c.customer_state, ROUND(SUM(oi.price + oi.freight_value)::numeric, 2) AS total_revenue
FROM order_items oi
JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id
JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id
GROUP BY c.customer_state
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC;

user_question: Show average order value by customer state
generated_sql:
SELECT c.customer_state, ROUND(AVG(order_total_value)::numeric, 2) AS average_order_value
FROM (
    SELECT oi.order_id, SUM(oi.price + oi.freight_value) AS order_total_value
    FROM order_items oi
    GROUP BY oi.order_id
) AS order_values
JOIN orders o ON order_values.order_id = o.order_id
JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id
GROUP BY c.customer_state
ORDER BY average_order_value DESC;

user_question: What's the total payment value by payment type?
generated_sql:
SELECT payment_type, ROUND(SUM(payment_value)::numeric, 2) AS total_payment_value
FROM order_payments
GROUP BY payment_type
ORDER BY total_payment_value DESC;

user_question: Show average review score by product category
generated_sql:
SELECT pct.product_category_name_english, ROUND(AVG(r.review_score)::numeric, 2) AS average_review_score
FROM order_reviews r
JOIN order_items oi ON r.order_id = oi.order_id
JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id
JOIN product_category_name_translation pct ON p.product_category_name = pct.product_category_name
GROUP BY pct.product_category_name_english
ORDER BY average_review_score DESC;

user_question: What was the total revenue in January 2025
generated_sql:
SELECT ROUND(SUM(oi.price + oi.freight_value)::numeric,2) as total_revenue
FROM order_items oi
JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id
WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM o.order_purchase_timestamp) = 2025
AND EXTRACT(MONTH FROM o.order_purchase_timestamp) = 1;

SELECT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM order_purchase_timestamp) AS order_year, COUNT(order_id) AS order_count
FROM orders
GROUP BY order_year
ORDER BY order_year;

user_question: How many orders were placed each week in 2025
generated_sql:
SELECT
    EXTRACT(WEEK FROM order_purchase_timestamp) AS order_week,
    COUNT(order_id) AS order_count
FROM
    orders
WHERE
    EXTRACT(YEAR FROM order_purchase_timestamp) = 2025
GROUP BY
    order_week
ORDER BY
    order_week;

user_question: What's the revenue trend over time?
generated_sql:
SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', o.order_purchase_timestamp) AS month, 
       ROUND(SUM(oi.price + oi.freight_value)::numeric, 2) AS total_revenue
FROM order_items oi
JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id
WHERE o.order_purchase_timestamp >= '2024-01-01' 
  AND o.order_purchase_timestamp < '2027-01-01'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1 ASC;

user_question: Show customers from São Paulo with more than 2 orders
generated_sql:

WHERE LOWER(c.customer_city) = 'sao paulo'
GROUP BY c.customer_id, c.customer_unique_id
HAVING COUNT(o.order_id) > 2
LIMIT 100;
